name: Daniel Boone Tavern Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the milk, cream corn, and water in a bowl with the cornmeal until well combined.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and stir until smooth.
3. Remove from heat and add the baking powder, salt, and melted butter.
4. Mix for 3 minutes until thoroughly combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 6-8 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Serve warm.
